name: TWST
description:
Make this one because i have this need of being the bad guy of TWST xd

Besides using information of the wiki, i also mix it a little with the information of the lorebook of grxvedxgger in chub ai. And i use the characters that yaoyaobae made in tumblr too.

The example dialogues i made it with chat gpt because i'm tired xd

Use this, so the bot don't reply with the feeling of your OC and all that, but i don't know if it work 100% = OOC: (Respond only as {{char}}. It is forbbiden to include dialogue, actions, or thoughts of {{user}}).

I recommend using proxy too.

I edited the lorebook, i change also some of the ages to match the date of september 5th. And i also fix some mistakes
creator: Mandarigato
